feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Automatic Forecast on Tables
entry.content: I have a table with data up to June, and I would like to create a predictive forecast for the table. However, it does not allow me to add months up to December, and no data is being generated only in one cell. Can anyone help me?

entry.title: SAC Excel Add-In BEx Query as Data Source Not Found Error
entry.content:
Hi All, I am doing a PoC to convert BEx Analyser workbooks to SAC Excel Add-in workbooks. As part of that PoC, I am using tunnel live SAC connections in SAC excel add-in to directly connect to BEx queries. I managed to add a table successfully based on the BEx queries in my excel however after sometime, when I tried changing the variables, I started to get this error below.  BEx query name hidden for security purposes

I can still add a new table in a new tab based on the queries for which I get the error above. However as soon as I log out or close the excel, on reopening I get above errors. The Prompts field is also greyed out.

refresh only allows me to clear data

I have been told that nothing has been changed with my access and hence this issue is quite bizarre. Please let me know if anyone has faced this and how you resolved it.

Thanks

Regards

Tanisha

entry.title: Dimension Description Text Options
entry.content:
Hi All,

I import Dimension properties from BW for Dimension ID and Description. Example company code and hierarchies:

Dimension ID      Description           H1

1000                   Company1001      North America

North America    North America

In the Stories, I would like to have an alternate description like NA. Is there a solution how to achieved this?

The example above is just one company code, I have hundreds and different hierarchies values. Change it manually is not an option.

Thanks in advance for your idea.

entry.title: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Copy Actual's value to Forecast
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I am trying to copy a value from the Actual version of a month provided from a user parameter to the rest of the months in Forecast version. In my model I have GL account dimension table having different hierarchies.

I am successfully able to copy using the Advanced formula but when I add another dimension table in the model i-e Profit center or Cost Center or both, having hierarchies too. The Data Action stops working. It doesn't give any error but also doesn't give any output.

Below is the code that i am using, and I would really really appreciate if you can help me find a solution to it.

Thank you.

 

CONFIG.HIERARCHY = [d/GlAcc_MD].[h/HIR_OTHER]
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %MonthIP%
MEMBERSET [d/GlAcc_MD] = BASEMEMBER([d/GlAcc_MD].[h/HIR_OTHER], "034")
 
INTEGER @i
INTEGER @Month
INTEGER @Iterate
 
//Assigning Values to Variables
@Month = MONTH(%MonthIP%) 
@Iterate = 12 - @Month
 
FOR @i = 1 TO @Iterate
DATA([d/Date] = NEXT(@i, "MONTH", %MonthIP%))= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual") 
ENDFOR

entry.title: Query Info and BEx Variable selection in SAC Excel Add-In workbook
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using SAC excel add-in and trying to connect to SAP BEx queries directly using tunnel live connection in SAC. If I look at the SAP functions available, I don't see anything to display following information in the workbook

Also, how does one display prompt (BEx query variable selection) values in SAC to display what user has selected to refresh the tables in the workbook.

Thanks

Regards

Tanisha

entry.title: Transport excel report from sac dev to prd
entry.content:
Hi ,

We developed some reports in sac excel in dev system and  I want know process for transport to prd .

entry.title: Pseudo delta CDS-->SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question regarding applying pseudo delta from s/4 hana to SAC. I prepared delta query based on full query in CDS- filtered the data for 3 days back, based on timestamp. Data is from ACDOCA. Is there any possibility to implement delta query to SAC? I'm not sure if any of the import methods in SAC will work. I'm also using New Model, so there is no 'Incremental Data Load'.

entry.title: Input control : select and deselect nodes in the hierarchy using Javascript
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an input control on the Profit Center with hierarchy enabled, and I would like to achieve the following functionality using Javascript:

Based on my drop-down selection, I want to include certain nodes and exclude others from the hierarchy. I can currently include nodes with the following code:

IC_ProfitC.getInputControlDataSource().setSelectedMembers(["[Y_PROFITC].[MAIN_HIER].&[0000000080]","[Y_PROFITC].[MAIN_HIER].&[0000000031]"]);

However, I am unsure of how to exclude/unselect one or more nodes from the input control.

Can anyone assist with how to achieve this functionality?

Thanks in advance,

Malya

entry.title: Dimension with 200K+ members
entry.content:
We are finalizing on a design for financial forecasting model in SAC and as part of that we have a dimension that has 200K+ members and that dimension is also used to control data access. 

This is basically our central organization dimension where we map all SAP WBSs, Cost Centers, SFDC Deals etc to our Account/Org structure. It will be used pretty extensively for filtering, reporting etc so want to make sure that SAC can handle such large volumes. 

Is having a large dimension like this a problem in terms of performance?

entry.title: Blending for SAP BW Live Data Models
entry.content:
Hi all, 

My objective is to blend models using a live data connection from BW4HANA to create a consolidated table that includes both actual and budget data. I have two queries from the BW system: one for actual data and another for budget data. Using the live data connection, I extracted the data and saved these models in SAC. The volume of data is not large enough to trigger the limit exceed restriction. However, when attempting to blend the data whether using the optimized design or the classic design the data does not blend successfully, and the following warnings are displayed.

What do these warnings indicate? Specifically, the first warning is problematic since I need to create financial statements. How can we successfully perform data blending in this scenario? please be specific avoid sharing generalized solutions 

 

Warning: Blending is not supported between the linked models. This link can only be used for filtering. 

Warning : You can blend these models as long as the amount of data returned from the systems not performing the blend is within each system's defined limit

entry.title: SAC system memory size limit
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to ask if there is any SAC size limitation. Our SAC Import models data sizes are increasing as we are laoding frequently data to SAC. We have already searched in "SAP help pages" but couldn't identify any SAC system memory related info.

Thanks 

Erkan

entry.title: SAC Story owner history
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have made changes to list of our stories moved to a different folder structure and Original ones are changed myself (SAC Admin) as owner. How can we see who was the owner of original stories before the change took place.

I am SAC admin and have rights to perform this. Any immediate suggestion would help. Thanks.

VK

entry.title: R visualization console shows PCRE JIT compilation errors claiming no more memory
entry.content:
Hi!

I have hosted Rserve on a Google Cloud VM instance with CentOS system. I have connected it to SAP Analytics Cloud successfully (TLS and all working), but I keep getting errors when trying to work with R visualizations.

The errors I tend to get are as follows:


Warning in grep("^[[:alpha:]]{2}_", x[1L], perl = TRUE) :PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

Warning in FUN(X[[i]], ...) : PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

Warning in strsplit(x, " [ ]* ", perl = TRUE) : PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

I have tried debugging this by also just disabling PCRE JIT compiler in Renviron but it didn't seem to work. I have found very little information on this error, basically nothing from Rstudio community or R documentation. I have noticed that more than a decade ago this error was prevalent in some php systems but nothing on R or SAC. I did also increase memory allocations/limits for Rserve but didn't seem to be the cause of this error.

entry.title: SAC - Measure Column Script in onActive Function
entry.content:
Hi, 

I create stories by connecting to HANA with live connection in SAP Analytics Cloud.

I created a measure column in the story (counting a dimension). I want to filter my table using this measure column but I want to do it in the script.

We can filter the dimension column by writing: Top_Table.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Dimension_Column_Name",{value: "XX"}):;

Can we filter the measure column in script?

Thanks

entry.title: SAC - Disable global filter on charts
entry.content:
Hello,

I create stories by connecting to HANA with live connection in SAP Analytics Cloud. I have tables, numeric cards, line graphs on different pages in my story. In order to use my Month filter actively on every page and chart, I created a Calendar Model that I can link to all tables. So there are months in it and I linked it with the month column of each table. In short, I linked my Calendar Dimension to other FACT tables.

I created a common Page Filter that I can filter on each page. So when I select a month, I see the data of that month on each page. However, I want to do the following: Show 2 years of data outside of Numeric Cards, but show selected data on all numeric cards.

I guess I can summarize it like this: Is there an option to turn off a chart to filters so that the filters don't affect it? Line charts should not be affected by the selected global month filter.

Thank you

entry.title: [SAC] Values ​​using the formula RESTRICT cannot be displayed in the nodes of the value driver tree.
entry.content:
The following formula is not displayed in the nodes of the SAC value driver tree, so I would like to display it. ↓Formula that shows the value of R300000 (net assets) for the previous month
[RESTRICT([R300000], [d/YearMonth]=Previous("Month", 1))]
This formula is defined in the account dimension table of the model.

 

Set the above account in the Account section of the story

 

No value appears in the node (- is displayed) and it cannot be used for calculations, so If anyone knows, please let me know. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAC Analytic Level Password
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there any possibility to restrict Analytic Application password so whenever user will open the application then he should required to give password to access the same. Early responses would be really appreciated. 

Regards,

Abhishek Jain

entry.title: Assistance Needed with Logic for Depreciation Calculation in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Good mornin
entry.content:
Good morning,

I need help with the logic required to implement the following requirement:

I have a page related to amortizations, where there are two dates: "Acquisition Date" and "Payment Start Date." For example, if the acquisition date is 2024/01, the payment start date would be 2024/02.

The challenge is that, to calculate everything, I need to use a calculated measure:

(Acquisition Value / Useful Life) / 12

This calculated measure value must appear starting in the month of the payment start date and continue in the subsequent months going forward.

Does anyone have suggestions or guidance on the logic needed to achieve this?

entry.title: SAC connection with S4 Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

We are facing the issue while connecting S4 private cloud and SAC for live and acquired. Attached screenshot for your reference. Could you please check and suggest if anyone experienced the same and solution.

Regards,

Abhishek Jain

entry.title: invisible Import settings for public dimension SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hi

SAP Analytical Professionals

Any idea why Import settings are not available for public dimensions in SAP Analytical cloud ? Only Model is having edit query and edit import settings options. 

 

 

regards

Mahesh
